title: EKP Plan Output
description: Codex hyperplan-style adversarial planning output. Each phase covers >=1 build.md Gate. Strict-mode JSON Schema: every object has additionalProperties=false and every property is required (use empty arrays/strings for not-applicable fields).

adversarial_rounds.description: Distilled output of the 5-role adversarial debate (Skeptic/Validator/Architect/Researcher/Creative).

consensus.description: Points all 5 roles agreed on after Round 3. Use [] if no consensus reached.

unresolved_conflicts.description: Issues where roles still diverged. Use [] if everything reached consensus.

resolution.description: How the plan handles the unresolved conflict (defer, flag for human, choose-one-rationale, etc.). Use empty string only if truly unresolvable.

phases.description: Ordered execution phases. Each phase must declare its scope and which gates it satisfies.

objective.description: One paragraph: what this phase accomplishes.

scope_globs.description: Files the build agent is ALLOWED to create/modify in this phase. Outside this list = guardrail violation.

gates_satisfied.description: Gate IDs from build.md frontmatter that this phase fulfills (e.g., ['G1', 'G3']).

how_to_test.description: Shell command or test runner invocation the reviewer will use.

expected_outcome.description: What success looks like (exit code, output pattern, file existence).

dependencies.description: Phase IDs this phase depends on (must complete first). Use [] for phases with no prerequisites.

risk_notes.description: Phase-specific risks surfaced during adversarial round. Use empty string if none.

global_risks.description: Cross-phase risks the build agent should be aware of. Use [] if no global risks.

all_gates_covered.description: True iff every gate in build.md frontmatter appears in at least one phase's gates_satisfied.

uncovered_gates.description: Gate IDs from build.md that no phase covers. Should be empty; non-empty = plan is incomplete.
